subtitle_main:
An open standard, a collective evolution
TCP/UP belongs to no one. Its future depends on those who use it.
card_contrib_title: Contribute to the project
card_contrib_text: The protocol is open and collaborative. You can take part in its evolution through the "https://github.com/taltan/tcp-up"Doctrine & Core or the "https://github.com/taltan/tcp-up-i18n"internationalization (i18n) repository.
card_discuss_text: Join our discussion space to talk about the protocol, ask technical questions, and share your feedback directly with the community.
card_casdetude_title: Propose a case study
card_casdetude_text: Your use of TCP/UP could inspire other creators.
registre_intro: These websites and creators display their transparency with TCP/UP.
adopter_description: The official protocol website applies its own labels (HCE for content, ACE for development).
registre_add_call: Do you use TCP/UP? Add your site to the registry.
comite_text: An advisory committee is currently being formed to represent different uses (journalism, tech, academic, artistic).
roadmap_text: The public roadmap will be published soon. It will detail the planned evolutions of the protocol and the milestones of shared governance.
